name: Sarah M.
text: My furnace stopped working on the coldest day of the year and Queensway had a technician at my door within 2 hours. He diagnosed the problem quickly, had the part on his truck, and had heat restored before dinner. Absolutely incredible service — I won't call anyone else.

name: David K.
text: We had Queensway install a new Lennox heat pump this summer. From the quote to the install, everything was transparent and professional. The team explained our rebate options and helped us get over $8,000 back. Highly recommend!

name: Priya R.
text: Our AC went out in July and Queensway had it repaired same day. The technician was honest — told us the repair would last and the unit didn't need replacing. That kind of integrity is rare. Five stars without question.

name: James T.
text: Signed up for the maintenance plan last year and it's paid for itself already. They caught a cracked heat exchanger during the fall tune-up — could have been a CO situation. These folks are thorough and genuinely care about safety.
